title: Smoky Mediterranean Tofu Skewers
description: A flavorful and healthy vegetarian skewer dish inspired by the Mediterranean, featuring smoky tofu and a mix of savory vegetables.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
In a small bowl, whisk together smoked paprika, salt, and pepper.
Cut the tofu into 1-inch cubes and brush with olive oil.
Thread the tofu, olives, cherry tomatoes, red onion, and red bell pepper onto skewers.
Season the skewers with the spice mixture.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, or until the tofu is golden brown and the vegetables are tender.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley if desired.
